section_miscategorizations.text: CT scan shows a possible kidney stone.
section_miscategorizations.reason: This statement is an imaging result and belongs in O, but in the context of the note it conflicts with the Plan entry 'Order a CT scan without contrast of the abdomen and pelvis,' which implies the CT has not yet been performed. One of these is temporally misplaced. Either the CT result should be removed from O (if the scan is being ordered) or the CT order should be removed from P (if the scan has already been done). As written, the mismatch between an already-completed CT result and a new CT order is misleading.
